children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: There is hereby imposed on each covered corporation a tax equal to 1 percent of the fair market value of any stock of the corporation which is repurchased by such corporation during the taxable year.

children.heading: Covered corporation
children.label: b Covered corporation
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “covered corporation” means any domestic corporation the stock of which is traded on an established securities market (within the meaning of section 7704(b)(1)).

children.label: A
children.text: a redemption within the meaning of section 317(b) with regard to the stock of a covered corporation, and

children.label: B
children.text: any transaction determined by the Secretary to be economically similar to a transaction described in subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Treatment of purchases by specified affiliates
children.label: 2 Treatment of purchases by specified affiliates

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The acquisition of stock of a covered corporation by a specified affiliate of such covered corporation, from a person who is not the covered corporation or a specified affiliate of such covered corporation, shall be treated as a repurchase of the stock of the covered corporation by such covered corporation.

children.label: i
children.text: any corporation more than 50 percent of the stock of which is owned (by vote or by value), directly or indirectly, by such corporation, and

children.label: ii
children.text: any partnership more than 50 percent of the capital interests or profits interests of which is held, directly or indirectly, by such corporation.

children.heading: Adjustment
children.label: 3 Adjustment
children.text: The amount taken into account under subsection (a) with respect to any stock repurchased by a covered corporation shall be reduced by the fair market value of any stock issued by the covered corporation during the taxable year, including the fair market value of any stock issued or provided to employees of such covered corporation or employees of a specified affiliate of such covered corporation during the taxable year, whether or not such stock is issued or provided in response to the exercise of an option to purchase such stock.

children.heading: Special rules for acquisition of stock of certain foreign corporations
children.label: d Special rules for acquisition of stock of certain foreign corporations
A
children.text: such specified affiliate shall be treated as a covered corporation with respect to such acquisition,

children.label: B
children.text: such acquisition shall be treated as a repurchase of stock of a covered corporation by such covered corporation, and

children.label: C
children.text: the adjustment under subsection (c)(3) shall be determined only with respect to stock issued or provided by such specified affiliate to employees of the specified affiliate.

children.label: A
children.text: the expatriated entity with respect to such covered surrogate foreign corporation shall be treated as a covered corporation with respect to such repurchase or acquisition,

children.label: B
children.text: such repurchase or acquisition shall be treated as a repurchase of stock of a covered corporation by such covered corporation, and

children.label: C
children.text: the adjustment under subsection (c)(3) shall be determined only with respect to stock issued or provided by such expatriated entity to employees of the expatriated entity.

children.heading: Applicable foreign corporation
children.label: A Applicable foreign corporation
children.text: The term “applicable foreign corporation” means any foreign corporation the stock of which is traded on an established securities market (within the meaning of section 7704(b)(1)).

children.heading: Covered surrogate foreign corporation
children.label: B Covered surrogate foreign corporation
children.text: The term “covered surrogate foreign corporation” means any surrogate foreign corporation (as determined under section 7874(a)(2)(B) by substituting “” for “” each place it appears) the stock of which is traded on an established securities market (within the meaning of section 7704(b)(1)), but only with respect to taxable years which include any portion of the applicable period with respect to such corporation under section 7874(d)(1).September 20, 2021March 4, 2003

children.heading: Expatriated entity
children.label: C Expatriated entity
children.text: The term “expatriated entity” has the meaning given such term by section 7874(a)(2)(A).

to the extent that the repurchase is part of a reorganization (within the meaning of section 368(a)) and no gain or loss is recognized on such repurchase by the shareholder under chapter 1 by reason of such reorganization,

in any case in which the stock repurchased is, or an amount of stock equal to the value of the stock repurchased is, contributed to an employer-sponsored retirement plan, employee stock ownership plan, or similar plan,
in any case in which the total value of the stock repurchased during the taxable year does not exceed $1,000,000,
under regulations prescribed by the Secretary, in cases in which the repurchase is by a dealer in securities in the ordinary course of business,
to repurchases by a regulated investment company (as defined in section 851) or a real estate investment trust, or
to the extent that the repurchase is treated as a dividend for purposes of this title.
to prevent the abuse of the exceptions provided by subsection (e),
to address special classes of stock and preferred stock, and
for the application of the rules under subsection (d).
